title: Life choices: seek Kingdom vs highest good
description: Add an underlying idea to the Binary God-vs-Satan coaching framework: life choices should seek first the Kingdom of God and His righteousness, with humility, faith, and hope that God works all things for good, bringing peace.
full_idea: I want to add to that idea an idea underneath it. Remember that life comes down to two choices seek first the kingdom of God and his righteousness, which is it another way of saying seek the highest good you can, or do something different. And do so with humility and faith in the goodness and love of God, with hope that he uses all things for good. This brings peace.
source_text: I want to add to that idea an idea underneath it.
